rationale: Public Health at L3 needs to capture the distinct working communities: chronic-disease epidemiologists in cardiovascular epi vs. cancer epi, biostatisticians focused on survival vs. Bayesian methods, etc. Thirty-six leaves split topic-by-topic within the L2 buckets. I deliberately separated 'Climate-Health' from 'Environmental Health' even though they overlap — the climate-health community is distinct and growing fast.

subfields.name: Cardiovascular Epidemiology
subfields.tagline: CVD cohorts, risk scores, primordial prevention research.

subfields.name: Cancer Epidemiology
subfields.tagline: Risk factors, screening, survivorship at population scale.

subfields.name: Metabolic & Diabetes Epidemiology
subfields.tagline: T2DM, obesity, MASH at population level.

subfields.name: Reproductive & Perinatal Epidemiology
subfields.tagline: Maternal outcomes, birth defects, fertility epi.

subfields.name: Life-Course & Aging Epidemiology
subfields.tagline: Early-life exposures, healthy aging, multimorbidity.

subfields.name: Epidemiologic Methods & Study Design
subfields.tagline: Cohort design, target trial emulation, confounding methods.

subfields.name: Respiratory Virus & Vaccine Epidemiology
subfields.tagline: Flu, RSV, COVID, vaccine effectiveness research.

subfields.name: Outbreak Modeling & Transmission Dynamics
subfields.tagline: Transmission models, Rt estimation, scenario modeling.

subfields.name: Antimicrobial Resistance Surveillance
subfields.tagline: Population AMR trends, hospital AMR epi, ABR drivers.

subfields.name: Syndromic & Genomic Surveillance
subfields.tagline: Wastewater, pathogen genomics for surveillance, syndromic systems.

subfields.name: Clinical Trial Methods & Adaptive Designs
subfields.tagline: Group-sequential, platform, adaptive trial methodology.

subfields.name: Survival & Time-to-Event Methods
subfields.tagline: Competing risks, joint models, multi-state survival.

subfields.name: Longitudinal & Mixed-Effects Methods
subfields.tagline: Mixed models, GEE, joint longitudinal-survival models.

subfields.name: Missing Data & Measurement Error
subfields.tagline: Multiple imputation, measurement error correction, partially observed.

subfields.name: LMIC Clinical Interventions & Implementation
subfields.tagline: Trial-tested LMIC interventions, implementation in low-resource settings.

subfields.name: Neglected Tropical Diseases
subfields.tagline: NTDs, mass drug administration, integrated NTD control.

subfields.name: Global Maternal & Child Health
subfields.tagline: MCH outcomes globally, vaccination programs, nutrition interventions.

subfields.name: Air Pollution & Respiratory Health
subfields.tagline: PM2.5, ozone, wildfire smoke, indoor air health effects.

subfields.name: Chemical Exposure & PFAS
subfields.tagline: PFAS, endocrine disruptors, lead and metals, pesticides health.

subfields.name: Water, Sanitation & Hygiene
subfields.tagline: WASH interventions, drinking water quality, sanitation health.

subfields.name: Occupational Health & Safety
subfields.tagline: Workplace exposures, musculoskeletal at work, occupational respiratory.

subfields.name: Health Insurance & Coverage Policy
subfields.tagline: Medicare/Medicaid policy research, single-payer comparative, coverage expansions.

subfields.name: Drug Pricing & Pharmaceutical Policy
subfields.tagline: Price negotiation policies, biosimilars, value-based pricing research.

subfields.name: Comparative Health Systems
subfields.tagline: Cross-country comparison of organization, financing, outcomes.

subfields.name: Cost-Effectiveness & Health Technology Assessment
subfields.tagline: ICERs, HTA frameworks, value frameworks, real-world cost analysis.

subfields.name: Quality of Care & Patient Safety
subfields.tagline: QI outcomes research, patient safety, never events.

subfields.name: Comparative Effectiveness & Real-World Evidence
subfields.tagline: RWE methodology applied, comparative effectiveness in claims/EHR data.

subfields.name: Health Behavior Change
subfields.tagline: Behavior-change interventions, theory-based behavioral research.

subfields.name: Social Determinants of Health
subfields.tagline: Income, education, housing as health drivers; equity research.

subfields.name: Health Communication & Misinformation
subfields.tagline: Health messaging, vaccine hesitancy communication, misinformation research.

subfields.name: Obesity & Diet Policy (Population)
subfields.tagline: Food environment, sugar taxes, school nutrition policy research.

subfields.name: Opioid & Substance Use (Population)
subfields.tagline: Opioid epi, fentanyl trends, harm reduction outcomes.

subfields.name: Suicide Prevention Research
subfields.tagline: Means restriction, postvention, mental-health crisis systems.

subfields.name: Firearm Injury Research
subfields.tagline: Gun violence prevention, policy evaluation, firearm injury epi.

subfields.name: Implementation Science Frameworks
subfields.tagline: CFIR, RE-AIM, hybrid effectiveness-implementation trials.

subfields.name: Climate Change & Health
subfields.tagline: Heat, vector range shifts, food-system health, climate-attribution mortality.

uncovered_concerns: Maternal & Child Health L2 has fewer L3 leaves than its volume might suggest — papers fold into global MCH or reproductive-perinatal epi.
Did not split COVID research into its own leaf — COVID papers spread across respiratory/vaccine/outbreak/long-COVID; classifier handles via abstract content.
